## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets` passes (no warnings)
- [ ] `cargo test` passes (all tests)
- [ ] My changes do not introduce telemetry, analytics, or cloud dependencies
- [ ] My changes preserve privacy-first and local-first principles
